overview: Florida Wellness and Regenerative Medicine offers comprehensive pain management and regenerative medicine treatments for chronic pain conditions. The clinic uses advanced injection techniques and regenerative medicine to address root causes of pain and promote healing.
highlights: PRP and Exosome regenerative medicine injections
Diagnostic testing for muscle and nerve conditions (EMG/NCS)
targetAudience: Patients seeking non-surgical pain management and regenerative medicine treatments for chronic conditions.
